creator: lukas.slebodnik@intrak.sk
text:
Fixes for CVE-2017-12173 were merged in upstream to 1.13 branch which is a LTM version. BTW CVE-2017-12173 was not in 1.11.7

I assume new 1.13 upstream version will be released soon and I would prefer to keep sssd on LTM version due to fast development in latest version.
